generated_oml:
// Sensing components
instance HokuyoUST10LXSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST10LX LiDAR sensor providing dense 3‑D point clouds for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DeepSense D435i depth camera providing raw depth imagery used for 3‑D perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelD435i_DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance EgoSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor on the chassis measuring ego velocity in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance EgoSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring ego steering input in real‑time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EgoSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state measurement unit providing vehicle parameters such as acceleration and voltage"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

// Data transmitted across Wi‑Fi via ROS2 DDS/UDP
instance HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXSensor
]

instance IntelD435i_DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iSensor
]

instance EgoSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoSpeedSensor
]

instance EgoSteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EgoSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// Data ingested in the DT
instance HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized LiDAR point cloud data transmitted over Wi‑Fi via ROS2 DDS/UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoUST10LX_PointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClustererEnabler
]

instance IntelD435i_DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth image from Intel D435i depth camera transmitted over Wi‑Fi via ROS2 DDS/UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData IntelD435i_DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackerEnabler
]

instance EgoSpeedTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed time‑series data transmitted over Wi‑Fi via ROS2 DDS/UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance EgoSteeringAngleTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego steering angle time‑series data transmitted over Wi‑Fi via ROS2 DDS/UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoSteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateTimeSeriesData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state measurement time‑series data transmitted over Wi‑Fi via ROS2 DDS/UDP"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

// Models instantiated in the DT
instance ACCControllerISO15622Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control controller compliant with ISO 15622 (Performance Class I)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance DBSCANClustererModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering algorithm applied to LiDAR point clouds for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANClustererEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter tracker for associating detected objects across time"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterTrackerEnabler
]

instance SQLDataStorageSchemaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SQL schema for persistent storage of telemetry and tracking data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLStorageEnabler
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D representation model for vehicle and environment visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// Enablers that orchestrate model execution and services
instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 node responsible for serializing and type‑aligning sensor data before transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance ROS2Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 DDS/UDP middleware enabling data exchange between onboard and cloud"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService, TrackingService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Execution engine for the ACC controller logic"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DBSCANClustererEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Node that runs DBSCAN clustering on LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrackingService
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Node that applies Kalman filter tracking on extracted object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrackingService
]

instance SQLStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interface for persisting telemetry and object track data into SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionStorageService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Renderer that drives the 3‑D visualization model"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance ActuationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bridge that sends actuator commands to vehicle’s motor controller and steering servo"
    DTDFVocab:enables ActuationService
]

// Services delivering insights and actions to the user
instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for reliable delivery of sensor data across the network"
    DTDFVocab:provides RawDataFlowInsight
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing real‑time monitoring UI and generated reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeACCDecisionReportInsight, SpeedLimitInsight, VehicleTelemetryInsight, DiagnosticPerformanceReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing ACC algorithm offloaded to the cloud"
    DTDFVocab:provides ExecuteACCDecisionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service allowing remote enabling/disabling of ACC and adjustment of desired speed, emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, AdjustDesiredSpeedAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service rendering the 3D vehicle/environment view and control panel"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]

instance DataCollectionStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service collecting and storing telemetry and tracking data into SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStorageInsight
]

instance TrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing object track streams generated by DBSCAN and Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance ActuationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service issuing motor voltage, steering, and emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedCommandAction, SteeringCommandAction, EmergencyBrakeCommandAction
]

// Insights extracted from the DT
instance RawDataFlowInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating real‑time flow of serialized data between sensors and cloud"
]

instance RealTimeACCDecisionReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting real‑time ACC decisions and diagnostics"
]

instance SpeedLimitInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating applicable speed limits in the vehicle’s environment"
]

instance VehicleTelemetryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing detailed vehicle telemetry such as speed, steering, and vehicle state"
]

instance DiagnosticPerformanceReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight containing performance diagnostics generated from DT services"
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing real‑time object track streams derived from point‑cloud processing"
]

instance DataStorageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating successful storage of telemetry and tracking data into SQL database"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight representing the 3‑D vehicle and environment view rendered by the visualization service"
]

// Actions allowing users to control the vehicle via the DT
instance ExecuteACCDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action executing the ACC decision computed by the cloud"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action enabling the ACC feature on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action disabling the ACC feature on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust the desired speed setpoint for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action commanding motor voltage to control vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SteeringCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action commanding steering servo to achieve desired steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action commanding vehicle to perform emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Physical actuation components
instance MotorVoltageActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator that sends motor voltage commands to control vehicle speed"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator that controls vehicle steering through servo mechanisms"
]

instance EmergencyBrakeActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator that initiates emergency braking procedure on the vehicle"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands—desired speed, steering angles, emergency brake signals—to the Physical Twin via the Actuation FE over the same Wi‑Fi link; the outputs are converted into motor voltage commands and steering servo signals to actuate the vehicle."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operations run in real‑time with a maximum end‑to‑end latency of 100 ms and clock synchronization within 100 ms; sensor sampling and DT processing are performed at the perception cycle rate (≈10–20 Hz), while ACC decision updates are issued each perception cycle."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensing/actuation), Digital Twin Entity (data processing, ACC logic), and User Entity (UI visualisation), connected via Data Translation FE, with communication over ROS2 DDS on Wi‑Fi linking on‑board and cloud‑based components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The twin covers the Operated lifecycle stage, providing real‑time monitoring and remote control during vehicle operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time fidelity is constrained by a 100 ms latency budget; DBSCAN and Kalman‑filter algorithms provide proven clustering and tracking fidelity; ACC follows ISO 15622 specifications, while data integrity is preserved via synchronized clocks and type‑aligned data translation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication uses a Wi‑Fi network with underlying UDP over ROS2 DDS; intra‑entity communication occurs within the ROS2 network; data translation is handled by the Data Translation FE, ensuring message type and unit consistency."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT runs partially on the on‑board NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano (edge compute) and partially in a cloud environment for ACC computation, both running Linux with ROS2 and NVIDIA JetPack."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Reference Architecture), ISO 15622 for ACC, and ROS2 middleware; OPC Unified Architecture (IEC 62541) is mentioned as a possible QoS/translation FE option."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical requirements include maintaining <100 ms latency, 100 ms clock synchronization (R7, R8), modular design per ISO 23247, and controlled remote command execution to prevent accidental human‑harm."
]
